/.title: Israel Ortiz — Web Developer

h1: I build modern, fast, user-friendly websites
h2: I turn ideas into websites that work
p: Responsive, accessible sites with clean code and thoughtful UX — from concept and design through to launch.

I'm Israel — a web developer focused on clean, responsive, and accessible websites. I work with WordPress, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to turn designs and ideas into fast, polished sites. My goal is simple: a site that's easy to use and easy to maintain.
Whether you're launching a new site, redesigning an existing one, or adding donation and contact forms — I'll take the build from concept through to launch, collaborating and refining along the way.
